title: Spatio-Environmental Drivers of Water Scarcity in Semi-Arid Catchments: Insights from NDWI and LULC
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Spatio-Environmental Drivers of Water Scarcity in Semi-Arid Catchments: Insights from NDWI and LULC. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
